'''Tols Vengra''' was a [[Jenet/Legends|Jenet]] thug working for [[Opun Mcgrrrr]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
During his childhood on [[Garban]], Tols Vengra wanted to became a civil servant. Being a Jenet, he already had an extraordinary memory, but he chose to improve it by implanting an [[Borg Construct Aj^6|Aj^6]] in his brain. This connection with his brain erased some of his personality and pride, and suddenly he found his previous goal uninteresting.<ref name="Spare Parts" />

He tried to become an officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], but not being a Human, the Empire rejected him absolutely. He tried again and was then threatened: The Empire could use him as a slave. After a second similar threat, Vengra decided to forget this second goal.<ref name="Spare Parts" />

Vengra then met a criminal businessman named [[Opun Mcgrrrr|Opun "Black Hole" Mcgrrrr]]. Mcgrrrr hired Vengra to increase his profits as a thug. However, Vengra was stealing some of Mcgrrrr's new incomes, as he wanted to return to Garban with much more money.<ref name="Spare Parts" />

Mcgrrrr had a rivalry with [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] after Jabba defeated Mcgrrrr in some business on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. Infuriated, Mcgrrrr stole Jabba's accounting droid [[CZ-3/Legends|CZ-3]]. He wanted to get the information in CZ-3's brain and then use it to blackmail Jabba. Unknowing to Mcgrrrr, Jabba had foreseen his movement and CZ-3 was already spying Mcgrrrr and sending that information to Jabba.<ref name="Spare Parts" />

Mcgrrrr lost control on CZ-3 and sent Vengra to recover it. At the same time, Jabba sent a [[Snivvian/Legends|Snivvian]] bounty hunter, [[Takeel/Legends|Takeel]], also to recover CZ-3. The three of them met, and Vengra stated that the droid was a property of Mcgrrrr. Before the situation could be solved, however, Takeel's brother [[Zutton/Legends|Zutton]] appeared and shot and destroyed CZ-3. Vengra returned to Mcgrrrr to report his failure.<ref name="Spare Parts" />
